name: Spaghetti Alla Putanesca
recipeIngredient: 14 oz Italian plum tomatoes (canned), including liquid
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add garlic and anchovies; cook until almost melted.
3. Chop tomatoes and add them to the skillet.
4. Stir in black olives and capers; cook for 5 minutes.
5. Cook spaghetti according to package directions; drain.
6. Mix tomato mixture with cooked spaghetti.
7. Sprinkle with chopped parsley and serve immediately.
Makes 4 to 6 servings.
